problem: How to achieve biological nitrogen fixation in non-legume crops to eliminate fertilizer?
hypothesis: If Rhizobium inoculation for nitrogen fixation is applied to to, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: Life cycle assessment with 12 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: We cannot solve problems with the same thinking that created them. — Einstein paraphrase
